name: skills
description: Applied skills: shadcn-tailwind (shadcn 4 + Tailwind v4), design-engineer, speed-daemon (optimistic UI), quality-audit (stack-aware repo audit), saltintesta (prose tone), flavored-md (GFM form-matching), zoom-out (strategic project review), changelog (skimmable decision log). Narrow, stack-specific discipline, each earned against a named model and checked by a runnable probe.
